steps.title: Consultation

about.label: About
about.title: Meet
about.intro: I'm Clifford Roberts III, a visual storyteller based in Virginia Beach with a passion for cinematic photography.
about.body:
For the past several years, I've dedicated myself to capturing the raw emotion and authentic moments that define life's most important stories. Whether it's a maternity session celebrating new beginnings, a fashion editorial pushing creative boundaries, or an intimate couples moment — I approach every frame with intentionality and artistry.

My style blends technical mastery with genuine human connection. I don't just take photos; I create visual narratives that resonate. Each session is a collaboration, and every image tells part of your story.

When I'm not shooting, you'll find me exploring light, pushing creative boundaries, or investing in my growth — both as a photographer and as a person.
